rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value. Elec. Code §254.092 governs officeholder expenditure reporting. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: An officeholder is not required to report officeholder expenditures made from the officeholder's personal funds, except as provided by Section 253.035(h).
_note: Rule text is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions; no conflict detected.
